Title: Navigate to Open in Browser
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Open in Browser."
Expected Result: User is directed to open the current page in an external browser.

Title: Call Business after Navigating
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
Expected Result: User is prompted to call a business number.

Title: Like/Dislike Option After Calling Business
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Like/Dislike."
Expected Result: User can like or dislike the business.

Title: Return to Homepage After Like/Dislike
Preconditions: User has liked or disliked a business.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Homepage."
Expected Result: User returns to the homepage.

Title: Modify Preferences from Homepage
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Homepage."
2. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
Expected Result: User can modify their preferences.

Title: Access Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on a page with a link to the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the link to access the Pathfinder page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Pathfinder page.

Title: Navigate Back from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the previous page.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Input for Preferences
Test Data: Invalid preference input (e.g., special characters, numbers instead of text).
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Homepage."
2. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
3. Enter invalid preference data.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating invalid input.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Consecutive Navigations
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Open in Browser."
3. Click on "Call Business."
4. Click on "Like/Dislike."
5. Click on "Homepage."
6. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
7. Click on "Homepage."
Expected Result: User successfully navigates through all steps without errors.

Title: Edge Case - Rapid Backward Navigation
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Indietro" button multiple times rapidly.
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the previous page without any errors or unexpected behavior.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing Link to Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on a page without a link to the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the link to access the Pathfinder page.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the link is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid Preference Input
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Homepage."
2. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
3. Enter valid preference data.
Expected Result: User's preferences are updated successfully.

Title: Negative Test Case - Empty Preference Input
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Homepage."
2. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
3. Leave preference input fields empty.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the input cannot be empty.

Title: Negative Test Case - Nonexistent Business Number
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the business number does not exist or is invalid.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid Business Number
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
Expected Result: User is prompted to call the valid business number.

Title: Negative Test Case - Invalid Business Number Format
Test Data: Invalid business number format (e.g., letters instead of digits).
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the business number format is invalid.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Consecutive Likes/Dislikes
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
3. Click on "Like/Dislike."
4. Click on "Like/Dislike" again.
Expected Result: User's action is recorded correctly, and the system updates the like/dislike status accordingly.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing Homepage Button
Preconditions: User is on a page without a "Homepage" button.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Homepage" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Homepage" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid Homepage Navigation
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Homepage."
Expected Result: User remains on the homepage without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Modifica preferenze" Button
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Modifica preferenze" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Modifica preferenze" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Modifica preferenze" Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Homepage."
2. Click on "Modifica preferenze."
Expected Result: User is directed to the preference modification page without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Call Business" Button
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Call Business" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Call Business" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Call Business" Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
Expected Result: User is prompted to call the business number without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Like/Dislike" Button
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Like/Dislike" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Like/Dislike" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Like/Dislike" Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Call Business."
3. Click on "Like/Dislike."
Expected Result: User can like or dislike the business without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Open in Browser" Button
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Open in Browser" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Open in Browser" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Open in Browser" Navigation
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Navigate."
2. Click on "Open in Browser."
Expected Result: User is directed to open the current page in an external browser without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Navigate" Button
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Navigate" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Navigate" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Navigate" Navigation
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Navigate."
Expected Result: User is directed to the navigation options without any issues.

Title: Negative Test Case - Missing "Indietro" Button
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to click on the "Indietro" button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating that the "Indietro" button is missing or unavailable.

Title: Positive Test Case - Valid "Indietro" Navigation
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Indietro" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the previous page without any issues.
